name: BigLot Media Plan
description: Manage BigLot content ideas, production schedules, and daily summaries.

tools.name: add_content_idea
tools.description: Add a new content idea to the backlog. If a URL is provided, metadata (title, thumbnail, metrics) will be auto-enriched from the platform.

url.description: URL of the content (YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok)

title.description: Title of the content (auto-enriched if URL provided)

tools.name: list_content_ideas
tools.description: List content ideas from the backlog. Can filter by status (new, reviewed, approved, rejected) and platform.

tools.name: update_content_idea
tools.description: Update an existing content idea (title, notes, status, description).

idea_id.description: UUID of the idea to update

tools.name: delete_content_idea
tools.description: Delete a content idea from the backlog.

idea_id.description: UUID of the idea to delete

tools.name: schedule_shoot
tools.description: Schedule a shoot date for a content idea. Moves the idea into the production calendar.

backlog_id.description: UUID of the idea to schedule

tools.name: get_today_schedule
tools.description: Get the production schedule for today. Shows what content needs to be shot today.

tools.name: get_week_schedule
tools.description: Get the production schedule for the next 7 days.

tools.name: update_production_status
tools.description: Update the production status of a scheduled item. Stages: planned -> scripting -> shooting -> editing -> published

tools.name: get_daily_summary
tools.description: Get a daily summary including new ideas, today's shoots, and in-progress items.
